summary: Monitor and Themes pages now render through shared status badges, Mantine containers, segmented filters, and continue to build cleanly.

checks.name: CHECK-01: MonitorPage uses StatusBadge across statuses
checks.command: python3 -c "from pathlib import Path; t=Path('frontend/src/pages/MonitorPage.tsx').read_text(); print(t.count('StatusBadge') >= 4 and 'monitor-step-' not in t)"

checks.name: CHECK-02: MonitorPage uses Mantine panels/chips
checks.command: python3 -c "from pathlib import Path; t=Path('frontend/src/pages/MonitorPage.tsx').read_text(); print('Badge' in t and 'Paper' in t and 'label-chip' not in t and 'event-log' not in t)"

checks.name: CHECK-03: ThemesPage uses SegmentedControl and StatusBadge
checks.command: python3 -c "from pathlib import Path; t=Path('frontend/src/pages/ThemesPage.tsx').read_text(); print('SegmentedControl' in t and 'StatusBadge' in t and 'filter-chip' not in t and 'sentiment-' not in t)"

checks.name: CHECK-04: Frontend build passes
checks.actual: Build succeeded after workflow migration B and at final verification.
